assertions.title: Generator is invoked during codegen step 8

steps.action: Run deterministic Step 8 executor check via mix run --no-start val_gen_009.exs using demo Solution Space map
steps.expected: Generated output directory contains CRUD artifacts (types.ts, routes.ts, migration.sql, tests.test.ts)
steps.observed: Step 8 wrote output/*/lib/demo/from_step8.ex files, but required CRUD artifact checks were all false

assertions.issues: Act3 Step 8 execution completed, but generator CRUD artifacts were not present in output (types.ts/routes.ts/migration.sql/tests.test.ts all missing).

assertions.title: CRUD generator handles entity with multiple relationships

steps.action: Generate CRUD artifacts for an entity spec with belongs_to + belongs_to + many_to_many relationships
steps.expected: Migration includes foreign-key REFERENCES and/or join table, routes include nested resource endpoints, TS includes relationship fields
steps.observed: TS relationship fields and SQL REFERENCES were present, but join table generation and nested relationship routes were absent

assertions.issues: Generator output did not include join-table handling for many_to_many and did not emit nested resource routes for related entities.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
